column1: Hey isaac, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
We would like to go to Cabo
How many people you got in your squad so far?
8-12 more likely on the lower side
gotcha that's still a solid group, what school you guys go to?
side note- what's a good email for you? Can get you the info for Cabo here in a few
oh that's wassup we have a lot of people from Bama coming this year
Loved “oh that's wassup we have a lot of people from Bama coming this year”
Here's a link for the info/pricing for your week, I can email you over a more in depth quote when i get home a little later!
Is the hotel an all inclusive?
Nvm I realized it was I was looking at the hotel website and it through me off when it said free breakfast
all good lol yea it is all inclusive, all you can eat and drink on the resort
Perfect does this trip include anything outside of the hotel?
Yea we also have a party package add on, I'll make sure that's in the email when i send it over!
Liked “Yea we also have a party package add on, I'll make sure that's in the email when i send it over!”
Hey I don't think I got your email yet? Idk if it's something on my end. Should I send the link that u sent me to my friends to book it. What r the next steps?
yea let me resend you that!
for the next steps I'll set up a reservation specific for your group, and send it over. each you hop in, join a slot, create your account, and add your deposit to secure the reservation
just resent that email too lmk if you got it
I did not get it if u want to try Isaacgfialkow@gmail.com I think that one may work
lol bet, saw you started a reservation from that quote, were y'all ready to get started? i'll have to adjust some things on it for you
that one is a general quote rather than your exact reservation
Ok I j read the email it says booze cruise will be added for free if deposit before 10/10 does that mean everyone in my group has to j have there deposit done by 10/10
Also ik it says the payment plan for Tesoro hotel but not riu sante fe
hey! yea so each person that deposits by 10/10 gets the free booze cruise included. saw yours just came in, will add it to your account right now
Perfect how do I add people to my room?
How do i add people not in my room to my group for the booze cruise

and the payment plan you see is valid for Riu Santa Fe, it just happened to be below the Tesoro in the email quote but it was for all the options. and to add people to your room they just go in and select 'join trip' on the slot below your name
im gonna add the 2nd room for you now too so that the other ppl can hop in as well
or did you need the 9 slots total now?
got it, all 9 slots are in now. and booze cruise is added to each slot
Do I j send my friends the link u gave me?
They'll select join this trip. then join trip on a slot, and follow the same steps you did
theyll have their own accounts, enter their own details, and make their own payments
Loved “theyll have their own accounts, enter their own details, and make their own payments”
Ok so one person has his name in 2 rooms and doesn't know how could u remove one of them by anychajce he is saying he only paid once
Yea I can remove one no prob. I'll check it now
Which room does Xander want to be in
Can u add another 3 person room plz
Yea I got you no prob
They ready to hop in right now?
yoo Isaac those people hopping in the 2 person room? operations team is asking whats up
I'll tell them to sign asap

yeo isaac bro, heads up. I would hit up Chance, Jacob, Jared, and Grant and let them know to get their 2nd payments in asap. operations team is doing a sweep today and adding late fees to those who didn't get that in
Ok they r gonna pay it later
When r the fees coming in?
aight bet. honestly any point in time today im actually not exactly sure
I can put a note in about it to see if they can hold off through the day
word I gotchu will do that rn. just make sure they get that situated today if you can
Liked “word I gotchu will do that rn. just make sure they get that situated today if you can”
mind letting a few of the guys know theyre behind on payments. Grant, Jared, Jacob
Jacob j told me he's struggling to find where to pay on the website
word just send him the reservation link. he'll use the log in he created to log in and make his payment on his account
theres a big make a payment button, can't miss it
yerr whats good bortha, Jared and Grant are still behind on payments. They still plan on going? Ops team are on my back about it lol
Yeah they r planning on going I'll text them
sup brotha, Luca and Grant are still behind, any update on them?
Yo can we add people to the booze cruise and can we change rooms by any chance
yoyo, what changes do we want to make to the rooms
and adding ppl to the booze cruise, wym, like other ppl no tin your group? are they staying at the same resort
the cheapest I could find as of now is in the 900s
my bd that last text wasnt for you ^
For the booze cruise they r staying at Riu Baja California
Can u switch Xander for Kaiden
yoooo thats all set my dog
whenever y'all can, can you start adding your flight info to your flights tab on your accounts
We have a booze cruise correct and can we add people
we unfort can only gett ppl linked up on the booze cruise if theyre on one of the resorts we can service. thatd be the Riu Santa Fe, Riu Palace, and Tesoro
the booze cruise wont be private to just your group btw, you'll also be with other groups that are traveling with us. kinda like a party cruise
Liked “the booze cruise wont be private to just your group btw, you'll also be with other groups that are traveling with us. kinda like a party cruise”
yoooo my dog. is Xander on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
word you all on the same flight?
yoyo did y'all want to add any of the other party pass events to the trip?
you got the booze cruise locked in
What other party passes are still available?

rn you got the booze cruise locked in. theres also a nightclub party pass that you could use to go to off resort spots like Squid Roe, La Vaquita, and Mandala. pretty dope comes with open bar, express entry, and cover charge
How much is it for squid roe?
youll actually be able to get those when you arrive at the party pass desk with our Go Blue TOurs onsite staff
Liked “youll actually be able to get those when you arrive at the party pass desk with our Go Blue TOurs onsite staff”
